title: Leah Solivan endorses Incorruptible
summary: TaskRabbit founder Leah Solivan calls the book the one she wishes she'd had while building her company.
blockquote: As a mission-driven founder, this is the book I wish I'd had while building. Ries offers both a new vocabulary and concrete, hard-won examples for how to create real value without losing your soul at scale. He explains why mission and massive growth so often end up at odds — and, more importantly, how founders can be intentional about choosing a different path.
